71256852.title: 2022 World Athletics Championships – Men's high jump

pageprops.defaultsort: 2022 World Championships in Athletics - Men's high jump

71256852.extract: The men's high jump at the 2022 World Athletics Championships was held at the Hayward Field in Eugene, Oregon, on 15 and 18 July.
